beats.pad40_b0: the corridor floods to the ceiling and the current fights back; {HERO} presses deeper along a {MOTIF_HALL}
beats.pad40_b1: a {MOTIF_GALLERY} opens, statues watching from the green murk; {HERO} presses deeper along a {MOTIF_GALLERY}
beats.pad40_b2: the passage narrows to a {MOTIF_CRAWL}; {HERO} presses deeper along the {MOTIF_CRAWL}
beats.pad41_end: the corridor floods to the ceiling and the current fights back, and {HERO} is turned back from a {MOTIF_HALL}, the recovery set back to another dive
beats.pad41_b0: a {MOTIF_GALLERY} opens, statues watching from the green murk; {HERO} presses deeper along a {MOTIF_GALLERY}
beats.pad41_b1: the passage narrows to a {MOTIF_CRAWL}; {HERO} presses deeper along the {MOTIF_CRAWL}
beats.xf_ci_dec: a side passage forks off the main route into the drowned dark
beats.xf_ci_e0: the sound the pillar-forest for a shortcut ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_ci_e1: the drain-dive the overflow weir ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_ci_e2: the search the drowned wellhouse ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_ci_e3: the side passage pinches shut in the silt and {HERO} loses her bearings, forced to give up the branch and fall back
beats.xf_cix_dec: a side passage forks off the main route into the drowned dark
beats.xf_cix_e0: the cut through the sunken observatory stores ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_cix_e1: the try the astronomer stair ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_cix_e2: the side passage pinches shut in the silt and {HERO} loses her bearings, forced to give up the branch and fall back
beats.xf_ob_dec: a side passage forks off the main route into the drowned dark
beats.xf_ob_e0: the salvage the shattered dome instruments ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_ob_e1: the signal the surface too early ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_ob_e2: the side passage pinches shut in the silt and {HERO} loses her bearings, forced to give up the branch and fall back
beats.xf_rl_dec: a side passage forks off the main route into the drowned dark
beats.xf_rl_e0: the rifle the lesser niches ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_rl_e1: the chase the {RIVAL} marker buoy ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_rl_e2: the pry the sealed ambry ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_rl_e3: the side passage pinches shut in the silt and {HERO} loses her bearings, forced to give up the branch and fall back
beats.xf_rlx_dec: a side passage forks off the main route into the drowned dark
beats.xf_rlx_e0: the take the flooded scriptorium turn ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_rlx_e1: the follow the rope of bubbles up ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_rlx_e2: the side passage pinches shut in the silt and {HERO} loses her bearings, forced to give up the branch and fall back
beats.xf_tg_dec: a side passage forks off the main route into the drowned dark
beats.xf_tg_e0: the probe the winch chain gallery ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_tg_e1: the follow the eel-run drain ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_tg_e2: the test the maintenance crawl ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_tg_e3: the side passage pinches shut in the silt and {HERO} loses her bearings, forced to give up the branch and fall back
beats.xf_tgg_dec: a side passage forks off the main route into the drowned dark
beats.xf_tgg_e0: the read the drowned king inscriptions ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_tgg_e1: the pocket a loose gilt tessera ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_tgg_e2: the side passage pinches shut in the silt and {HERO} loses her bearings, forced to give up the branch and fall back
beats.xf_th_dec: a side passage forks off the main route into the drowned dark
beats.xf_th_e0: the search the courtier galleries ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_th_e1: the dredge the offering pool ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_th_e2: the force the choir-screen ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_th_e3: the side passage pinches shut in the silt and {HERO} loses her bearings, forced to give up the branch and fall back
beats.xf_thx_dec: a side passage forks off the main route into the drowned dark
beats.xf_thx_e0: the detour through the drowned kitchens ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_thx_e1: the climb the minstrel gallery ends badly and {HERO} is turned back into the cold, the run set back
beats.xf_thx_e2: the side passage pinches shut in the silt and {HERO} loses her bearings, forced to give up the branch and fall back
beats.ds_obs_b0: {HERO} commits: the {RIVAL} feints toward the ascent shaft, and the dark closes in
beats.ds_obs_e0: {HERO} follows the feint into a dead gallery and the rising water seals it; she surfaces late and empty
beats.ds_obs_b1: {HERO} commits: a wing of the dome peels loose above the control ring, and the dark closes in
beats.ds_obs_e1: the loose dome drives {HERO} off the control ring and she loses the seal window, forced up with the {REGALIA} but the {COURT} open
beats.ds_cf_b0: {HERO} commits: the font silt hides a second, deeper drop, and the dark closes in
beats.ds_cf_e0: the deeper drop swallows {HERO}'s line and she hauls out with nothing, the {RING} still below
beats.ds_td_b0: {HERO} commits: the {RIVAL} calls a false truce at the {THRONE} dais, and the dark closes in
beats.ds_td_e0: the truce is a stall; the {RIVAL} slips the {CIRCLET} away while {HERO} waits, and the first piece is lost
beats.n_ap_moat: {HERO} swims {ROUTE_A_CHAR}, current dragging at her rebreather, and the {TIDEGATE} arch looms
beats.n_ap_sluice: {HERO} forces {ROUTE_B_CHAR}, silt clouding her lamp, and comes up under the {TIDEGATE} arch
beats.n_ap_scaff: {HERO} climbs {ROUTE_C_CHAR}, rotted with disuse, and drops down beside the {TIDEGATE} arch
beats.n_ap_undertow: {ROUTE_D_CHAR} pulls {HERO} into a dead {CISTERN} pocket with no air, and she must surface, the dive aborted before it begins
beats.n_start: codename {HERO} reaches the black water over the sunken royal {COURT} at {OPENING_MOMENT}, the {RIVAL} expedition lights already burning on the far reef; three ways lead down to the {TIDEGATE}, {ROUTE_A_CHAR}, {ROUTE_B_CHAR}, and {ROUTE_C_CHAR}, plus one more, {ROUTE_D_CHAR}, that looks quick and wrong
beats.fan_tg_s0: the counterweight shears and the {TIDEGATE} slams, pinning {HERO}'s gear until she cuts free and retreats to open water, empty-handed
beats.fan_tg_s1: the air burst collapses the soft {TIDEGATE} arch and a slow ceiling-fall seals the passage behind her; {HERO} is forced back out to the sea
beats.n_tidegate_hub: the {TIDEGATE} hangs half-shut, its old wards humming faint in the dark water; the winch chain, a flooded gallery mouth, and a maintenance crawl all lead inward
beats.n_tg_gallery: beyond the {TIDEGATE} a submerged gallery opens, statues of drowned kings staring up through the green; two archways and a stair descend toward the {THRONE} level
beats.n_tg_left: the left archway threads past a toppled colonnade, and the {THRONE} gallery glimmers ahead
beats.fan_tgr_s0: the side door gives onto a flooded stair that drops without end into cold black; {HERO} loses her line and must claw back to the gallery, shaken and turned around, the dive lost
beats.n_tg_right: the right archway bends past a caved refectory, a shortcut sign in old {COURT} script pointing down
beats.n_tg_stair: the grand stair spirals down through silt into the {THRONE} level, and the great gallery opens below
beats.fan_throne_s0: the mosaic floor gives way over a void and {HERO} barely kicks clear, but her lamp and spare line are gone; blind, she retreats to the gallery mouth
beats.fan_throne_s1: the sarcophagus lids are trapped with old counterweights that drop a portcullis; {HERO} is walled off from the {CIRCLET} and must turn back
beats.n_throne_hub: the {THRONE} gallery yawns wide, the great chair drowned to its arms, and above it the {CIRCLET} of the last {QUEEN} catches {HERO}'s lamp; a {RIVAL} glow-stick already burns near the {THRONE} dais
beats.n_throne_dais: at the {THRONE} dais the {RIVAL} diver reaches for the {CIRCLET} too; {HERO} can race, feint, or cut the {RIVAL}'s tether and force a standoff
beats.n_throne_race: the {RIVAL} is faster and snatches the {CIRCLET}; {HERO} is outpaced at the first prize and forced to fall back to the gallery with nothing
beats.n_throne_feint: the feint works, the {RIVAL} lunges wide, and {HERO} slips onto the {THRONE} dais with the {CIRCLET} in reach
beats.n_throne_cut: the cut tether sends the {RIVAL} tumbling in the current; {HERO} can grab the {CIRCLET} now or secure the {RIVAL}'s gear first
beats.n_throne_greed: stripping the {RIVAL} costs seconds; a surge slams the gallery and the {CIRCLET} slides into a flooded fissure, gone beyond reach, and {HERO} retreats
beats.n_circlet_taken: the drowned {CIRCLET} is {HERO}'s first {REGALIA} piece, cold and heavier than it looks; the gallery exit leads on toward the {RELIQUARY} halls
beats.fan_thex_s0: {HERO} pauses too long and the rising tide floods the only exit; she is cut off and must blow her reserve to surface, the run over with a single piece
beats.n_throne_exit: past the {THRONE} the water darkens; a colonnade march and a servant crawl both bend toward the {RELIQUARY}
beats.fan_reliq_s0: the ward-lattice flares and a boom of pressure ruptures {HERO}'s ears; disoriented, she loses the {RELIQUARY} and gropes back the way she came
beats.fan_reliq_s1: the oubliette narrows to nothing and {HERO} wedges, freeing herself only by shedding her sample bag and the {CIRCLET} lead; she surfaces to regroup
beats.n_reliquary_hub: the {RELIQUARY} is a drowned vault of niches, the {SCEPTER} floating tethered in a bubble of trapped air behind a lattice of old wards; a {RIVAL} marker buoy bobs at the ceiling
beats.n_reliq_study: the wards answer to the old {COURT} cadence; {HERO} can time the lattice gaps, force it with a pry-bar, or flood the air bubble to drop the {SCEPTER}
beats.n_reliq_time: {HERO} slides through a ward-gap between pulses and closes on the {SCEPTER} tether
beats.n_reliq_force: the pry-bar snaps the lattice and the wards discharge, boiling the bubble away; the {SCEPTER} sinks into a sealed niche and {HERO} is driven back
beats.n_reliq_flood: flooding the bubble drops the {SCEPTER} into her hands but the inrush destabilizes the vault; take the {SCEPTER} and run, or shore the ceiling first
beats.n_reliq_shore: shoring wastes the margin; the vault sloughs silt and pins {HERO}'s line, and she abandons the {SCEPTER} to cut loose and retreat
beats.n_scepter_taken: the {SCEPTER} is {HERO}'s second {REGALIA} piece, its head crusted with pale coral; the way on drops toward the {CISTERN} vaults
beats.n_reliq_exit: two ways lead down from the {RELIQUARY}: a spillway shaft running fast with current, and a slow silted stair
beats.n_reliq_spill: the spillway is quick but wild; {HERO} can brace and ride it or grab a rung and slow down
beats.n_reliq_ride_fail: the spillway spits {HERO} into a debris grille and holds her against the flow until she cuts her fin harness free and blows to the surface, two pieces still below
beats.fan_cist_s0: the sump silt is bottomless and {HERO} sinks past her line length; she drops weights and rockets up, aborting the {CISTERN} run
beats.fan_cist_s1: the chisel cracks the wrong stone and a cold flood-tunnel opens; the current takes {HERO}'s tools and patience, and she withdraws
beats.n_cistern_hub: the {CISTERN} vaults are a cathedral of black water, pillars marching into dark, the {QUEEN} {RING} set in a drowned font at the far end; {RIVAL} bubbles trail up from somewhere near the font
beats.n_cistern_font: at the font the {RIVAL} is already prying the {RING} loose; {HERO} can confront, wait and shadow, or collapse the font arch to trap the {RING} in reach of only one of them
beats.n_cistern_confront: the confrontation is all silt and slow blows in the cold; {HERO} can wrestle for the {RING} or knock loose the {RIVAL}'s lamp and take it in the dark
beats.n_cistern_wrestle: the wrestle wastes both their air; the {RIVAL} breaks off with the {RING} and {HERO}, gauge in the red, must surface with only two pieces
beats.n_cistern_shadow: shadowing pays off; the {RIVAL} fumbles the {RING} into the silt and {HERO} sweeps it up before the cloud settles
beats.n_cistern_collapse: the arch comes down between them, sealing the {RIVAL} out; the {RING} is {HERO}'s to take, but the collapse has stirred the whole vault
beats.n_cistern_cache: the cache is a decoy; while {HERO} digs, the vault ceiling settles and floods the exit, and she barely surfaces with two pieces and a lesson
beats.n_ring_taken: the {QUEEN} {RING} is the third and last piece; all three {REGALIA} are {HERO}'s now, but the {COURT} is waking and the water is rising toward the {OBSERVATORY}
beats.n_cistern_exit: with the full {REGALIA} the way up runs through the drowned {OBSERVATORY}; a flooded orrery hall and a collapsed dome gallery both lead there
beats.n_cist_orrery: the orrery hall wheels of drowned brass turn slow in the current, and the {OBSERVATORY} opens beyond
beats.fan_dome_s0: a dome rib fails under {HERO} and a slab pins her against the gallery floor; she cuts free but the {REGALIA} bag tears and the {RING} is lost to the dark, and she surfaces with two
beats.n_cist_dome: the collapsed dome gallery is a maze of leaning slabs; a low crawl and a high ledge both angle toward the {OBSERVATORY}
beats.n_obs_deep_d: the {OBSERVATORY} antechamber is a drowned clock of brass rings, the ascent shaft light a distant coin overhead
beats.n_obs_deep_c: {HERO} threads the brass rings, the {RIVAL}'s lamp swinging somewhere ahead in the murk
beats.n_obs_deep_b: a drowned catwalk crosses the antechamber, groaning under the tide
beats.n_obs_deep_a: past the {OBSERVATORY} threshold the water thins to a cold breath of trapped air
beats.fan_obs_s0: the shutter mechanism fights back and a counterweight drops across the only stair; {HERO} is sealed below the {OBSERVATORY} and must ration back to the surface with the {REGALIA} but no way to seal the {COURT}
beats.n_observatory_hub: the drowned {OBSERVATORY} crowns the {COURT}, its shattered dome open to a shaft of surface light far above; here the old tide-mechanism could reseal the whole {COURT}, but the {RIVAL} has beaten {HERO} to the control ring and the water is still rising
beats.n_obs_control: the {RIVAL} holds the {OBSERVATORY} control ring, the last obstacle between {HERO} and a clean ascent with the full {REGALIA}; she can bargain, out-climb, or race the rising water to the ascent shaft
beats.n_obs_bargain: the {RIVAL} will trade a clear ascent for one {REGALIA} piece; {HERO} can give up the {CIRCLET}, give up the {RING}, or refuse and gamble
beats.n_obs_refuse: the gamble fails; the water beats them both to the shaft and the {RIVAL}, lighter, escapes first while {HERO} claws up last, empty-handed and outpaced to the surface
beats.n_obs_climb: {HERO} out-climbs the {RIVAL} up the {OBSERVATORY} ribs and reaches the control ring with the full {REGALIA} still slung
beats.n_obs_race: racing the water, {HERO} reaches the shaft foot ahead of the {RIVAL} but the tide-mechanism is behind her; seal now and lose seconds, or climb now and leave the {COURT} open
beats.n_obs_seal_choice: at the control ring, with all three {REGALIA}, {HERO} can work the old tide-mechanism to reseal the drowned {COURT} behind her; she can seal fast and rough, seal slow and true, or skip the seal to guarantee her own ascent
beats.n_seal_fast: the fast seal catches but the mechanism groans, half-set; {HERO} can force it home and lose air, or accept the partial seal and climb
beats.n_seal_force: {HERO} forces the mechanism home; the {COURT} groans shut, wards flaring one last time, and the ascent shaft is clear above
beats.n_seal_true: the slow true seal takes patience {HERO} barely has, but the {COURT} locks clean behind her, {REGALIA} and wards accounted for, and the shaft waits
beats.n_ascent_full: the shaft climbs through cold decompression stops toward the far coin of surface light; {HERO} can hold the stops properly or push the ascent to beat the {RIVAL} up
beats.n_ascent_push: pushing the stops is a gamble against her own blood; {HERO} can ease off at the last stop or commit to the fast surface
beats.n_end_full_best: {HERO} breaks the surface with the full {REGALIA} and the drowned {COURT} sealed clean behind her, the {RIVAL} left below to surface empty; the recovery is complete and the {COURT} will keep its dead in peace
beats.n_end_full_second: {HERO} surfaces with the full {REGALIA} and a good seal, a stop skipped and a headache to show for it, but the {COURT} is closed and the three pieces are recovered
beats.n_end_full_rough: {HERO} makes the surface fast and rough, {REGALIA} intact and {COURT} sealed, but the fast ascent costs her a hard week ashore; a win, paid for
beats.n_ascent_partial: with the {COURT} only half-sealed {HERO} climbs the shaft, {REGALIA} whole but the wards still murmuring below, a job mostly done
beats.n_end_partial_seal: {HERO} surfaces with all three {REGALIA} pieces but the {COURT} only half-sealed; the recovery stands, the sealing will need a second dive, a clever partial win
beats.n_obs_open_ascent: leaving the {COURT} open, {HERO} makes for the shaft with the full {REGALIA}; she can take the {RIVAL}'s trailing line up or climb her own
beats.n_open_rivalrope: the {RIVAL}'s line is a trap, weighted to foul; {HERO} cuts free but loses the {REGALIA} bag in the tangle and surfaces with nothing but the story
beats.n_end_open_full: {HERO} surfaces with the full {REGALIA}, the {COURT} left open behind her for the tide to keep; the pieces are recovered, the sealing refused, a complete but colder victory
beats.n_obs_trade_circlet: {HERO} hands the {CIRCLET} to the {RIVAL} and both climb the shaft under an uneasy truce, two pieces still hers
beats.n_end_trade_circlet: {HERO} surfaces with the {SCEPTER} and the {RING}, the {CIRCLET} gone to the {RIVAL}; two of three {REGALIA} recovered and a {RIVAL} owed a favor, a clever partial haul
beats.n_obs_trade_ring: {HERO} gives up the {RING} and takes the clear ascent, {CIRCLET} and {SCEPTER} secure against her chest
beats.n_end_trade_ring: {HERO} surfaces with the {CIRCLET} and the {SCEPTER}, the {RING} traded away; two {REGALIA} pieces home and the {COURT} still guarding its last, a measured partial win

titles.pad5_end: Out of Line in the Deep
titles.pad23_end: Out of Line in the Deep
titles.pad41_end: Out of Line in the Deep
titles.n_end_full_best: The Court Sealed, The Regalia Home
titles.n_end_full_second: All Three, and the Court Closed
titles.n_end_partial_seal: The Regalia Up, The Court Ajar
titles.n_end_open_full: Regalia Recovered, Court Left to the Sea
titles.n_end_trade_circlet: Two of Three, a Truce Kept
titles.n_end_trade_ring: The Ring Given, Two Brought Home

n_throne_dais.c_n_throne_dais_x4: The {RIVAL} calls a false truce at the {THRONE} dais.

n_obs_control.c_n_obs_control_x4: The {RIVAL} feints toward the ascent shaft.
